retry_reason: The device either exists or does not in the ACPI namespace; retrying will not change the outcome.
contract_summary: This function finds the INTC1035 ACPI device and acquires a reference to it via acpi_dev_get_first_match_dev. On success, the reference is stored in opr_dev->adev and ownership is transferred to the caller. The caller must call acpi_dev_put on opr_dev->adev when done with the device. On failure, returns -ENODEV and no reference is acquired.
